title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page after clicking the login button.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Payment process fails due to timeout error during checkout.

title: Password reset email not sent
description: Customers are not receiving password reset emails.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Displayed dashboard statistics do not match database values.

title: Mobile navbar breaking
description: Navbar items move to second line on medium devices.

title: File upload failed
description: Users cannot upload profile pictures larger than 2MB.

title: Search not returning results
description: Search functionality does not return expected results.

title: Email notification delay
description: System email notifications are delayed by several minutes.

title: Profile update error
description: Users receive an error while updating their profile information.

title: Session expires too quickly
description: User sessions expire within 5 minutes of inactivity.

title: Broken link on homepage
description: The 'Learn More' button redirects to a 404 page.

title: Slow loading reports page
description: Reports page takes more than 10 seconds to load.
